title: Gantt timeline export options
excerpt: Id like the ability to export the gantt in “days” or “weeks” as selected within the gantt settings, it currently appears to revert to “weeks” by itself when converting to pdf. I’d also like the pdf export to show the ent…

posts.author: Paul_Adams (Paul Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Id like the ability to export the gantt in “days” or “weeks” as selected within the gantt settings, it currently appears to revert to “weeks” by itself when converting to pdf. I’d also like the pdf export to show the entire widget, not just a selection of it.

Ive been told to take a screen shot …but with recent changes in the “thickness” of the gantt timeline, that makes it impossble as now the screen only shows half the information it used to.
